Package HWSystem.Protocols

Interface Protocol

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    I2C, OneWire, SPI, UART
    public interface Protocol
    Protocol Interface Represents a communication protocol in the system

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addToLog​(java.lang.String operation)
      Adds a read/write operation to the protocol's log
      java.lang.String getProtocolName()
      Returns the name of the protocol
      java.lang.String read()
      Reads data from the port
      void write​(java.lang.String data)
      Writes data to the port
      void writeLogToFile​(java.lang.String logPath, int portID)
      Writes the log to a file in descending order (from last to first)

    • Method Detail

      • getProtocolName

        java.lang.String getProtocolName()
        Returns the name of the protocol
        Returns:
        Protocol name as a string

      • read

        java.lang.String read()
        Reads data from the port
        Returns:
        String representing the read operation

      • write

        void write​(java.lang.String data)
        Writes data to the port
        Parameters:
        data - The data to write

      • addToLog

        void addToLog​(java.lang.String operation)
        Adds a read/write operation to the protocol's log
        Parameters:
        operation - The operation to add to the log

      • writeLogToFile

        void writeLogToFile​(java.lang.String logPath,
                    int portID)
        Writes the log to a file in descending order (from last to first)
        Parameters:
        logPath - The directory path where log files should be created
        portID - The ID of the port associated with this protocol
